testsuite.name: com.gmaingret.outlinergod.ui.screen.documentlist.DocumentListSyncTest

testcase.name: triggerSync upserts nodes from pull response
triggerSync sets Syncing then Idle on success
triggerSync omits settings from push payload when no pending
triggerSync updates lastSyncHlc after successful push
triggerSync includes settings in push payload when pending
triggerSync sets Error status on network failure

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
